name: Jiangsu Jujie Microfiber Technology Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Jiangsu Jujie Microfiber Technology Group Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, and sale of microfiber fabrics, clothing, and textile products in China. It offers superfine fiber leather fabrics; hygroscopic fast drying, velvet, and cool type fabrics; dustless wipe clothes, clean cotton swabs, car wiping papers, oblique and straight type piece suits, and family portraits; and microfiber bathrobe, swimwear, sports towel, beach towel, sports clothing, bedspread, sofa cover, and textile products. The company also exports its products to Europe, North America, Southeast Asia, and other countries. Jiangsu Jujie Microfiber Technology Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 2000 and is based in Wujiang, China.
